feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Replying to @Kevin Flew from USA to Eurovision 🇸🇪!! Today we saw Eurovision Semi Final 2 evening preview in seats tucked way off in the corner that ended up being what I think were the best seats in the house since we could see the artists get ready and g
entry.content: Replying to @Kevin Flew from USA to Eurovision 🇸🇪!! Today we saw Eurovision Semi Final 2 evening preview in seats tucked way off in the corner that ended up being what I think were the best seats in the house since we could see the artists get ready and g

entry.title: I swear some airports hate us ✈️ what's your biggest airport pet peeve??? Mine are: Limited waterbottle fill stations you have to walk a mile to find, or when there's just an old fountain that barely works instead (ps SFO has stations with cold water and
entry.content: I swear some airports hate us ✈️ what's your biggest airport pet peeve??? Mine are: Limited waterbottle fill stations you have to walk a mile to find, or when there's just an old fountain that barely works instead (ps SFO has stations with cold water and

entry.title: Is German Nivea really worth the hype?? 🤔I found a tin in Denmark, been trying it out the past 2 weeks and even did research on ingredients... ✨ short story: unless you are allergic to a very specific ingrediant, it's literally the same as the American v
entry.content: Is German Nivea really worth the hype?? 🤔I found a tin in Denmark, been trying it out the past 2 weeks and even did research on ingredients... ✨ short story: unless you are allergic to a very specific ingrediant, it's literally the same as the American v

entry.title: mornings here are elite 👌🏻 the sauna is at 90 C/ 194 F 🥵 🔥 and feels so good after a jump into the canal. One of my favorite things to do in Copenhagen is a harbor swim and this sauna makes it even better!! 📍 Bølgebaderne @boelge.baderne #bølgebaderne #c
entry.content: mornings here are elite 👌🏻 the sauna is at 90 C/ 194 F 🥵 🔥 and feels so good after a jump into the canal. One of my favorite things to do in Copenhagen is a harbor swim and this sauna makes it even better!! 📍 Bølgebaderne @boelge.baderne #bølgebaderne #c

entry.title: They just make so much sense! #denmark #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #copenhagenlife #unitedstates #recycle #sustainability #dansk #danmark
entry.content: They just make so much sense! #denmark #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #copenhagenlife #unitedstates #recycle #sustainability #dansk #danmark

entry.title: Wanna make money while traveling Europe? Or sleeping? Get a @Flodesk email newsletter!! I’ve been using Flodesk for 5 years to deliver exclusive content right to my community. A website and an email newsletter subscriber lists are the only two touch poin
entry.content: Wanna make money while traveling Europe? Or sleeping? Get a @Flodesk email newsletter!! I’ve been using Flodesk for 5 years to deliver exclusive content right to my community. A website and an email newsletter subscriber lists are the only two touch poin

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’
entry.content: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
